seo.title: Lawyer in Faisal Town, Lahore | Property, Family & Civil
seo.description: Faisal Town lawyer for property mutation, family disputes, rental cases, and civil litigation. Convenient consultation by appointment.

hero.intro: Faisal Town lawyer for property mutation, family disputes, rental cases, and civil litigation. Convenient consultation by appointment.

bodyMarkdown:
Faisal Town is a planned residential and education-anchored neighbourhood between Gulberg and Allama Iqbal Town, with a stable middle-class to upper-middle-class resident base and significant rental stock. The legal-case profile of a **lawyer in Faisal Town Lahore** is centred on property work — mutation, registration, sale-purchase enforcement, rental disputes — alongside steady family-law and civil-litigation engagements. **Saeed Law Firm** has served Faisal Town residents since the area matured. Our office at 13 Fane Road is a 25-minute drive from central Faisal Town.

### Faisal Town-Specific Matters We Handle

**Property mutation and registration.** Sub-Registrar registration disputes, mutation entries, and inheritance-driven mutation work. See our [property lawyer in Lahore](/property-lawyer-in-lahore) page.

**Rental and ejectment cases.** Eviction under the Punjab Rented Premises Act 2009 — non-payment, breach of conditions, personal need.

**Family and matrimonial disputes.** Standard family-law work — divorce, khula, custody, maintenance, dower recovery. See our [family lawyer in Lahore](/family-lawyer-in-lahore) page.

**Civil suits.** Suits for declaration, recovery of money, specific performance under Section 12 of the Specific Relief Act 1877, and injunction.

**Inheritance certificates.** Succession certificates from Civil Court Lahore for movables and listed assets, supported by NADRA family-tree documentation.

### Where Faisal Town Matters Are Heard

- **Civil Courts Lahore** at Aiwan-e-Adal ([court page →](/courts/district-court-lawyer-lahore))
- **Family Courts** at Aiwan-e-Adal ([court page →](/courts/family-court-lawyer-lahore))
- **Revenue Authorities** for mutation matters
- **Sub-Registrar Lahore** for registration matters
- **Lahore High Court** for second appeals and writ jurisdiction ([court page →](/courts/lawyer-at-lahore-high-court))

### Travel and Consultation

Office to central Faisal Town: ~25 minutes by car. Zoom and WhatsApp consultations available.

### Why Saeed Law Firm for Faisal Town

- 50+ years of Lahore practice including stable client relationships in Faisal Town
- Multi-practice capability — property, family, civil under one roof
- Office in central Lahore with easy court access

### Frequently Asked Questions

**Where do I file a rental eviction case for a Faisal Town property?**
At the Civil Court Lahore under the Punjab Rented Premises Act 2009.

**How long does mutation of a Faisal Town property take?**
Routine mutation: 30–90 days. Contested mutation with appeals: 3–6 months at AC level, longer if appealed further.

**Can I sue a Faisal Town seller who refuses to register my property?**
Yes — under Section 12 of the Specific Relief Act 1877. Limitation is three years from the cause of action.

**Where are family courts for Faisal Town residents?**
At the Family Court complex, Aiwan-e-Adal, Mall Road, Lahore.

**How much does a lawyer in Faisal Town Lahore charge?**
Standard firm rates — initial consultation PKR 5,000–10,000, fixed-fee for routine matters, stage-based for litigation.

### Faisal Town Blocks We Serve

Faisal Town is structured across A, B, C, and D Blocks, each with its own residential and commercial profile. The commercial strip along Akbar Chowk and Faisal Town Main Boulevard concentrates retail, F&B, and education services; the residential blocks are largely middle-class to upper-middle-class. Our lawyer in Faisal Town Lahore work crosses both — commercial-lease disputes on the boulevard, rental matters in the residential blocks, and inheritance work on legacy properties held by Faisal Town families since the scheme's earlier development phases.

### Common Faisal Town Legal Patterns

A few patterns recur in Faisal Town matters: (1) rental disputes under the Punjab Rented Premises Act 2009, where the landlord-tenant relationship is informal and documentation is thin; (2) sale-purchase disputes where verbal agreements went sideways and one side now seeks specific performance under Section 12 of the Specific Relief Act 1877; (3) inheritance partitions where Faisal Town plots have been held by multiple heirs across generations without clean mutation; (4) family matters reflecting the area's settled middle-class resident base. The right practice is one that recognises which pattern your case falls into and structures the strategy accordingly.

### Related Lahore Practice Pages

See our [property lawyer in Lahore](/property-lawyer-in-lahore), [family lawyer in Lahore](/family-lawyer-in-lahore), and [civil lawyer in Lahore](/civil-lawyer-in-lahore) pages for the practice-area dimension. To meet Bilal Saeed, Advocate, [book a consultation](/contact-us).

details.label: Travel From Our Office
values: ~25 minutes by car from Fane Road

faqs.q: How do I book a consultation with Saeed Law Firm?
faqs.a: Use the contact form on this site, call our Fane Road office, or WhatsApp us. We respond within one business day and schedule a same-week appointment for most matters.

faqs.q: Do you serve clients outside Lahore?
faqs.a: Yes. We represent clients across Pakistan and overseas Pakistanis, with primary court appearances in Lahore. Remote consultations are available via Zoom and WhatsApp.

relatedPages.title: Property Lawyer in Lahore
relatedPages.description: Property lawyer in Lahore handling land disputes, mutation (intiqal), inheritance partition, DHA/LDA matters, and rental disputes. 50+ years' experience.

relatedPages.title: Family Lawyer in Lahore
relatedPages.description: Hire an experienced family lawyer in Lahore. Saeed Law Firm handles divorce, khula, child custody, and nikah disputes at Lahore Family Courts. Established 1975.

relatedPages.title: Civil Lawyer in Lahore
relatedPages.description: Civil lawyer in Lahore handling suits for declaration, possession, recovery, specific performance, and damages at Civil Courts and Lahore High Court.
